formula_note: Direct military building deaths from the 9/11 Commission.
uncertainty_note: No interval published in the source.
quality_note: Official building military numerator.

formula_note: Direct civilian building deaths from the 9/11 Commission.
uncertainty_note: No interval published in the source.
quality_note: Official building civilian numerator.

formula_note: 125 total Pentagon building deaths - 70 civilian - 55 military = 0 unknown-status deaths.
uncertainty_note: Arithmetic residual from official totals.
quality_note: Residual is exact because the civilian and military counts sum to the official building total.

formula_note: A bounded affected-area occupancy exists, but no military share of that exposed building population was located.
uncertainty_note: Publishing a military denominator would require unsupported allocation of mixed building occupancy.
quality_note: Intentionally left null rather than apportioning the affected wedges by assumption.

formula_note: A bounded affected-area occupancy exists, but no civilian share of that exposed building population was located.
uncertainty_note: Publishing a civilian denominator would require unsupported allocation of mixed building occupancy.
quality_note: Intentionally left null rather than using the whole Pentagon workforce or a proportional split.

formula_note: Tower-occupant deaths are retained as unknown-status because no meaningful military/civilian split is published for this bounded cohort.
uncertainty_note: Source gives a range rather than a single point.
quality_note: Strong total tower-occupant death range, correctly not forced into a civilian-vs-military split.

formula_note: Women person-months = one-third of total tower person-months, where total PM sums each tower's occupants × minutes exposed ÷ (60×24×30.4375).
uncertainty_note: Sex composition is proxied from NIST's roughly 2:1 male-to-female statement for tower occupants.
quality_note: Publishable denominator proxy for women in the tower cohort.

formula_note: No source-grounded child share of tower occupants was located.
uncertainty_note: Leaving child exposure null avoids turning an unreported denominator into zero.
quality_note: Unresolved because the exposed-child denominator is not documented for the tower cohort.

formula_note: Adult-male proxy person-months = two-thirds of total tower person-months using the same collapse-window exposure conversion.
uncertainty_note: Adult male is proxied from male occupants because child exposure is not separately tabulated.
quality_note: Publishable denominator proxy for adult males in the tower cohort.

formula_note: Not converted to a tower-only count because the 26% female share refers to broader WTC worker fatalities rather than a matched tower-occupant numerator.
uncertainty_note: Publishing a tower-only women death count would overclaim precision.
quality_note: Left null intentionally; only share-based women RR/disproportionality is published.

formula_note: The WTC tower episode excludes the commandeered aircraft, where all eight 9/11 child victims were located.
uncertainty_note: Source-grounded zero.
quality_note: Preserves a defensible zero rather than converting it to unknown.

formula_note: Not converted to a tower-only count because the male share comes from a broader worker-fatality cohort rather than a matched tower-only numerator.
uncertainty_note: Publishing a tower-only adult-male death count would overclaim precision.
quality_note: Left null intentionally; only share-based women RR/disproportionality is published.

formula_note: wc_dr_women = (adult-male death share / adult-male exposure share) / (women death share / women exposure share).
uncertainty_note: Proxy ratio because death shares come from BLS worker fatalities while exposure shares come from NIST tower-occupant sex composition.
quality_note: Method-safe proxy only; it is still preferable to a fake military-vs-civilian DR at WTC.

formula_note: Child deaths are zero, but child exposure in the tower cohort is unreported.
uncertainty_note: Leaving the child RR null avoids an undefined or artificial infinite artifact.
quality_note: Not publishable without a child exposure denominator.

formula_note: disproportionality_women = women share of deaths / women share of exposure = 0.26 / (1/3).
uncertainty_note: Proxy ratio because the death-share source is a broader WTC worker-fatality cohort.
quality_note: Useful as a cautious disproportionality indicator for women at WTC.

formula_note: Child death share is zero, but child exposure share for the tower cohort is unreported.
uncertainty_note: Leaving the child disproportionality null avoids forcing an unreported denominator to zero.
quality_note: Not publishable without a child exposure share.

formula_note: All 59 innocent passengers and crew aboard Flight 77 died.
uncertainty_note: None; the manifest episode has full fatality.
quality_note: Strong total manifest numerator.

formula_note: Person-months use the innocent-manifest size and the hijack-to-impact window, converted by person_days / 30.4375; best uses the midpoint hijack time of 8:52:30.
uncertainty_note: Low/high reflect the Commission's 8:51-8:54 hijack window.
quality_note: Tight site-specific denominator with explicit timing bounds.

formula_note: Adult women are manually coded from the roster after separating children under 18.
uncertainty_note: Manual coding rather than an official sex-tabulated manifest.
quality_note: Defensible but not as strong as an official age-sex manifest table.

formula_note: Children are direct age-coded roster entries under 18.
uncertainty_note: Ages are explicit in the roster.
quality_note: Strong child numerator for a tiny manifest cohort.

formula_note: Adult male deaths are the safe residual once adult women and children are removed from the 59 innocent deaths.
uncertainty_note: Residual is exact within the chosen non-overlapping coding scheme.
quality_note: Method-safe residual because women means adult women and children means under 18.

formula_note: Because the manifest episode is fully fatal, women exposure count equals women deaths and uses the same hijack-to-impact time window.
uncertainty_note: Low/high follow the hijack-window bounds.
quality_note: Tight subgroup denominator with exact manifest size.

formula_note: Because the manifest episode is fully fatal, child exposure count equals child deaths and uses the same hijack-to-impact time window.
uncertainty_note: Low/high follow the hijack-window bounds.
quality_note: Strong child subgroup denominator for a tiny manifest cohort.

formula_note: Because the manifest episode is fully fatal, adult-male exposure count equals adult-male deaths and uses the same hijack-to-impact time window.
uncertainty_note: Low/high follow the hijack-window bounds.
quality_note: Strong subgroup denominator for a tiny manifest cohort.

formula_note: All innocent women and adult men in the manifest died, so subgroup death rates are equal within the bounded cohort.
uncertainty_note: Mechanical result of complete fatality.
quality_note: Interpret cautiously because the cohort is tiny and fully fatal.

formula_note: All innocent children and adult men in the manifest died, so subgroup death rates are equal within the bounded cohort.
uncertainty_note: Mechanical result of complete fatality.
quality_note: Interpret cautiously because the cohort is tiny and fully fatal.

formula_note: Women share of deaths equals women share of exposure because every innocent occupant died.
uncertainty_note: Mechanical result of complete fatality.
quality_note: A contextual equality result, not a broad comparative claim.

formula_note: Child share of deaths equals child share of exposure because every innocent occupant died.
uncertainty_note: Mechanical result of complete fatality.
quality_note: A contextual equality result, not a broad comparative claim.

formula_note: All 40 innocent passengers and crew aboard Flight 93 died.
uncertainty_note: None; the manifest episode has full fatality.
quality_note: Strong total manifest numerator.

formula_note: Person-months = 40 innocent occupants × (10:03:11 - 9:28) ÷ (60×24×30.4375).
uncertainty_note: Single exact chronology used from the 9/11 Commission.
quality_note: Tight site-specific denominator.

formula_note: Adult women are manually coded from the official roster.
uncertainty_note: Manual coding rather than a direct official sex-tabulated manifest.
quality_note: Defensible but not as strong as a direct official sex tabulation.

formula_note: The youngest person aboard was 20, so child deaths under 18 are zero.
uncertainty_note: Source-grounded zero.
quality_note: Preserves a true zero.

formula_note: Adult male deaths are the safe residual once 20 adult women and zero children are removed from 40 innocent deaths.
uncertainty_note: Residual is exact within the non-overlapping coding scheme.
quality_note: Method-safe residual because all innocent victims were adults.

formula_note: Because the manifest episode is fully fatal, women exposure count equals women deaths and uses the same hijack-to-crash window.
uncertainty_note: Single exact chronology used.
quality_note: Tight subgroup denominator.

formula_note: Child exposure is zero because the youngest person aboard was 20.
uncertainty_note: Source-grounded zero.
quality_note: Preserves a true zero for child exposure.

formula_note: Because the manifest episode is fully fatal, adult-male exposure count equals adult-male deaths and uses the same hijack-to-crash window.
uncertainty_note: Single exact chronology used.
quality_note: Tight subgroup denominator.

formula_note: All innocent women and adult men in the manifest died, so subgroup death rates are equal within the bounded cohort.
uncertainty_note: Mechanical result of complete fatality.
quality_note: Interpret cautiously because the cohort is tiny and fully fatal.

formula_note: With source-grounded zero child deaths and zero child exposure, the child RR is undefined rather than informative.
uncertainty_note: No continuity correction is applied.
quality_note: Correctly left null to avoid an undefined artifact.

formula_note: Women share of deaths equals women share of exposure because every innocent occupant died.
uncertainty_note: Mechanical result of complete fatality.
quality_note: A contextual equality result.

formula_note: Both child death share and child exposure share are zero, so the ratio is undefined.
uncertainty_note: No artificial correction is used.
quality_note: Correctly left null to avoid a 0/0 artifact.
